summary: Decent recording of a solid show with lots of nice jamming, though Garcia sounds a bit goofy tonight.
review: The performance is described as heading toward greatness with plenty of enjoyable jams, earning a positive impression overall. Jerry Garcia’s playing is noted as a little goofy, but no major issues are reported about the audio itself.

ai_rating.rationale: One detailed 4‑star review highlights good musical performance and only minor quibble about Garcia’s playing; recording quality is not mentioned, so the rating reflects a solid show with an unknown but likely adequate recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific comments on soundboard or audience source; reviewers did not note any audio problems.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Review does not discuss set structure or pacing.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Garcia is described as a little goofy tonight.
